hero_subtitle: Sisanwo to rọrun, Idanilaraya to yara.
hero_description: Ni iriri pẹpẹ VTU ti o gbẹkẹle julọ ni Nigeria. PayStation n pese airtime, data, ati sisan owo lẹsẹkẹsẹ pẹlu aabo to gaju.
footer_tagline: Fifun igbesi aye oni-nọmba rẹ ni agbara pẹlu airtime ati data lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
all_rights: Gbogbo awọn ẹtọ wa ni ipamọ
why_choose: Kini idi ti o yan PayStation?
why_desc: Ohun gbogbo ti o nilo fun awọn iṣowo rẹ ni apamọwọ kan ṣoṣo.
data_rates: Awọn oṣuwọn Data to dara julọ
data_rates_desc: A n funni ni awọn ero data ti o rọrun julọ kọja gbogbo awọn nẹtiwọọki ni Nigeria.
testimonials_desc: Gbọ ohun ti awọn olumulo ati awọn aṣoju wa n sọ nipa PayStation.
faq_subtitle: Wa awọn idahun si awọn ibeere ti o wọpọ nipa lilo PayStation.
chat_with_us: Ṣe o tun ni awọn ibeere? Sọrọ pẹlu wa
ready_to_simplify: Ready to simplify your digital life?
trust_paystation: Darapọ mọ ẹgbẹẹgbẹrun awọn ara Naijiria ti o gbẹkẹle PayStation lojoojumọ.
auth_login_desc: Tẹ awọn alaye rẹ sii lati wọle si apamọwọ rẹ
auth_signup_desc: Ṣẹda akọọlẹ kan lati bẹrẹ irin-ajo rẹ pẹlu PayStation
auth_agree_tc: Mo gba si awọn ẹtọ ati Iṣakoso
auth_no_account: Ṣe o ko ni akọọlẹ kan?
auth_already_member: Ṣe o ti jẹ ọmọ ẹgbẹ tẹlẹ?
otp_desc: A ti fi koodu idaniloju nọmba 4 ranṣẹ si imeeli rẹ. Jọwọ tẹ ẹ sii ni isalẹ.
promo_desc: Gba 10% iṣẹ lori gbogbo iṣowo akọkọ ti awọn ti o tẹle ẹ.
agent_success_msg: Your application has been submitted for admin review.
agent_req_usage: Minimum 7 days of active usage required.
agent_req_trans: Minimum ₦10,000 total successful transactions in the last 7 days required.
feat_mobile_desc: Afẹfẹ ati data lẹsẹkẹsẹ fun gbogbo nẹtiwọọki.
feat_bills_desc: San owo inọ ati DSTV, GOTV lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
feat_exam_desc: Gba WAEC, NECO ati JAMB pin lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
feat_secure_desc: Tọu owo rẹ ki o si ṣakoso rẹ pẹlu aabo.
faq_q1: Bawo ni a ṣe n ra data?
faq_a1_s2: Ti o ko ba ti forukọsilẹ, jọwọ danna forukọsilẹ ni oke
faq_a1_s3: Lẹhin ti o ba wole, danna 'Fund Wallet' lati fi owo kun
faq_a1_s4: Danna 'buy data' ki o yan nẹtiwọọki ti o fẹ
faq_a1_s5: Danna 'send' ki o tẹ PIN iṣowo rẹ sii
faq_q2: Kini awọn koodu fun didanwo data?
faq_q3: Bawo ni mo ṣe n fi owo kun apamọwọ mi?
faq_a3_desc: O le fi owo kun nipa awọn ọna mẹrin wọnyi:
faq_a3_opt2: Online payment pẹlu ATM card rẹ.
faq_q4: Ṣe mo le ṣatunṣe akọọlẹ mi?
faq_a4_s3: Duro fun iṣẹju 1-15, data yoo de lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
agent_promo: Awọn owo wọnyi jẹ fun awọn olumulo deede. Di Aṣoju fun iye owo to dinku.
err_generic: Nkankan ti ko tọ ti ṣẹlẹ. Jọwọ tun gbiyanju.
err_auth_fail: Imeeli tabi ọrọigbaniwọle ti ko tọ.
err_user_exists: Olumulo kan pẹlu imeeli tabi orukọ olumulo yii ti wa tẹlẹ.
err_otp_invalid: Koodu OTP ko tọ. Jọwọ wo imeeli rẹ.
success_signup: Akọọlẹ ti ṣẹda! Jọwọ daju imeeli rẹ.
tc_agree_error: O gbọ dọ gba si awọn ẹtọ ati Iṣakoso lati tẹsiwaju.
tc_content_1_text: Kaabo si PayStation. Nipa lilo awọn iṣẹ wa, o gba si awọn ẹtọ wọnyi. Jọwọ ka wọn daradara.
tc_content_2_text: O ni iṣẹ fun mimọ aabo akọọlẹ ati ọrọigbaniwọle rẹ. O gba lati gba iṣẹ fun gbogbo awọn iṣẹ ti o waye labẹ akọọlẹ rẹ.
tc_content_3_text: Gbogbo VTU, data, ati sisan owo ni a ṣe lẹsẹkẹsẹ. Jọwọ rii daju pe o pese alaye ti o tọ.
tc_content_4_text: O ko le lo PayStation fun eyikeyi iṣẹ ti ko tọ, pẹlu ẹtan, tabi lilo awọn eto miiran laisi iyẹ.
tc_content_5_text: PayStation ko ni iṣẹ fun eyikeyi ibajẹ ti o waye lati lilo awọn iṣẹ wa.
tc_understand: Mo ye mi ati mo gba
